use_cases: Toggle between light and dark mode in application interfaces
Switch language or regional settings in multilingual apps
Navigate between different view modes or filters
Control application settings through a segmented control group
Theme selection in customizable UI dashboards
ai_summary: A segmented control component styled with glass-morphism featuring light/dark mode toggle buttons with a settings option. Uses backdrop blur, semi-transparent backgrounds, and smooth hover scale transitions for a modern, polished appearance. Commonly used as a theme switcher in UI component libraries, providing users with quick access to toggle between appearance modes.
